package rulefixtures

import (
	"crypto/sha256"
)

// scenario for weak_hash_for_integrity: `md5.New()`, `sha1.New()`, `md5.Sum()`, `sha1.Sum()` used for integrity checks, checksums, or MAC operations (not just `weak_crypto` import-level detection)
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario746Negative(payload []byte) []byte {
	sum := sha256.Sum256(payload)
	return sum[:]
}
